title: hortensia scandens
intro: Hortensia scandens, also known as the climbing hydrangea, is a type of flowering vine native to China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Hortensia scandens is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
